# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Creates pytest.ini to set log_file=pytest.log, ensuring pytest writes logs to a writable location.

## Suggested Diff (apply manually if needed)

```diff
--- /dev/null
+++ pytest.ini
@@ ... @@
[pytest]
log_file = pytest.log
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
